description: A ray driver is a component that takes a start origin and a direction and drives point A and B via a RayCast, keeping the distance between the two below MaxDistance.

fields.MaxDistance: the max distance that A and B can be from each other
fields.PointA: what to drive with the local space start position of the Raycast
fields.PointB: what to drive with the local space end point of the raycast
fields.LocalOrigin: the local space start point of the raycast
fields.LocalDirection: the direction in local space to fire the raycast in.

usage: * LaserPointer Tool with RayDriver by ProbablePrime
